reviewFocus: Check whether each proposed downstream claim is backed by the listed source handles without requiring copied private source content.
Flag missing caveats when evidence labels are qualitative, incomplete, derived from review output, or not independently verified.
Check that source handles are treated as opaque caller-owned retrieval hints, not proof, package-owned storage keys, or a portable resolution schema.
Check that the pack can guide caller-owned implementation or eval decisions without becoming a shadow store of private truth.
Keep source retrieval, domain interpretation, approval, retention, publication, and action routing caller-owned.
outOfScope: Do not infer private facts, source contents, customer identity, company identity, revenue, endorsement, legal status, or production readiness.
Do not approve publication, storage policy, remediation routing, or implementation priority.
Do not treat source handles as proof by themselves when the packet only summarizes what a private source is expected to support.
